hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, os, sys

print('\n\u2502 DEVLMER ECOSYSTEM ENGINE v3.1 \u2014 Session Start')
print('\u2514' + '\u2500' * 54)

profile_path = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), '.claude', 'PROJECT_PROFILE.json')
if not os.path.exists(profile_path):
    print('\u26a0\ufe0f  No PROJECT_PROFILE.json found \u2014 run project fingerprinting first')
    sys.exit(0)

try:
    with open(profile_path) as f:
        p = json.load(f)
except Exception as e:
    print(f'\u26a0\ufe0f  Could not read profile: {e}')
    sys.exit(0)

domain = p.get('domain', p.get('blueprint', 'generic'))
stack = p.get('primary_stack', {})
activated = p.get('activated_skills', [])

# Domain \u2192 recommended skills mapping (all, not just first)
DOMAIN_SKILLS = {
    'fintech':     ['senior-backend', 'security-audit', 'api-integration', 'code-reviewer'],
    'ecommerce':   ['senior-backend', 'senior-frontend', 'security-audit', 'ui-design-system'],
    'saas':        ['senior-backend', 'senior-frontend', 'security-audit', 'api-integration'],
    'chatbot':     ['senior-backend', 'api-integration', 'senior-prompt-engineer'],
    'ai_agent':    ['senior-backend', 'senior-prompt-engineer', 'api-integration'],
    'analytics':   ['senior-backend', 'db-migration', 'api-integration'],
    'devtools':    ['senior-backend', 'code-reviewer', 'api-integration'],
    'social':      ['senior-backend', 'senior-frontend', 'ui-design-system'],
    'healthtech':  ['senior-backend', 'security-audit', 'api-integration'],
    'edtech':      ['senior-backend', 'senior-frontend', 'ui-design-system'],
    'web3':        ['senior-backend', 'security-audit', 'api-integration'],
    'crm':         ['senior-backend', 'senior-frontend', 'api-integration'],
    'generic':     ['senior-backend', 'code-reviewer'],
}

# Stack \u2192 additional skills
STACK_SKILLS = {}
if 'frontend' in stack and stack['frontend']:
    STACK_SKILLS['frontend'] = ['senior-frontend', 'ui-design-system']
if 'backend' in stack and stack['backend']:
    STACK_SKILLS['backend'] = ['senior-backend', 'api-integration']
if 'database' in stack and stack['database']:
    STACK_SKILLS['database'] = ['db-migration']
if 'ai_ml' in stack and stack['ai_ml']:
    STACK_SKILLS['ai_ml'] = ['senior-prompt-engineer']

recommended = list(dict.fromkeys(DOMAIN_SKILLS.get(domain, DOMAIN_SKILLS['generic'])))
for layer_skills in STACK_SKILLS.values():
    for s in layer_skills:
        if s not in recommended:
            recommended.append(s)

print(f'\n  Domain detected : {domain}')
print(f'  Tech stack      : {list(stack.keys())}')
print(f'\n  \u2705 Skills activos: {chr(44)+chr(32).join(recommended)}')

# Agent suggestions based on domain
AGENT_SUGGESTIONS = {
    'fintech':   'code-reviewer (cambios de riesgo), security-audit (auth/trades)',
    'chatbot':   'api-integration (endpoints), senior-prompt-engineer (prompts)',
    'ai_agent':  'senior-prompt-engineer (prompts), code-reviewer (logic)',
    'saas':      'senior-architect (features complejas), code-reviewer',
    'generic':   'code-reviewer, senior-architect',
}
agent_hint = AGENT_SUGGESTIONS.get(domain, AGENT_SUGGESTIONS['generic'])
print(f'  \U0001f4a1 Agentes sugeridos: {agent_hint}')
print('')
"

python3 -c "
import os, sys

# Detect edited file from environment (Claude Code sets CLAUDE_FILE_PATH)
edited = os.environ.get('CLAUDE_FILE_PATH', '')
if not edited:
    sys.exit(0)

ext = os.path.splitext(edited)[1].lower()

# Extension \u2192 ALL relevant skills (not just the first)
EXT_SKILLS = {
    '.py':   ['senior-backend', 'security-audit', 'api-integration'],
    '.tsx':  ['senior-frontend', 'ui-design-system'],
    '.ts':   ['senior-frontend', 'ui-design-system'],
    '.jsx':  ['senior-frontend', 'ui-design-system'],
    '.js':   ['senior-backend', 'senior-frontend'],
    '.sql':  ['db-migration'],
    '.go':   ['senior-backend', 'api-integration'],
    '.rs':   ['senior-backend', 'security-audit'],
    '.java': ['senior-backend', 'api-integration'],
    '.rb':   ['senior-backend', 'api-integration'],
    '.php':  ['senior-backend', 'security-audit'],
    '.vue':  ['senior-frontend', 'ui-design-system'],
    '.svelte': ['senior-frontend', 'ui-design-system'],
    '.css':  ['ui-design-system'],
    '.scss': ['ui-design-system'],
    '.yaml': [],
    '.yml':  [],
    '.json': [],
    '.sh':   ['senior-backend'],
    '.tf':   ['senior-architect'],
}

skills = EXT_SKILLS.get(ext, [])

if not skills:
    sys.exit(0)

print(f'\n  \U0001f4da Skills activados para {ext}: {chr(44)+chr(32).join(skills)}')

# Context-aware agent suggestions
filename = os.path.basename(edited).lower()
agent_hints = []

if any(kw in filename for kw in ['route', 'endpoint', 'controller', 'api']):
    agent_hints.append('unit-test-generator \u2014 nuevo endpoint detectado')

if any(kw in filename for kw in ['auth', 'login', 'password', 'token', 'jwt', 'secret']):
    agent_hints.append('security-audit \u2014 archivo sensible de auth')

if any(kw in filename for kw in ['migration', 'schema', 'model', 'entity']):
    agent_hints.append('db-migration \u2014 cambio en modelo de datos')

if ext in ['.tsx', '.jsx', '.vue', '.svelte']:
    agent_hints.append('senior-frontend \u2014 verificar con Playwright')

if not agent_hints:
    agent_hints.append('code-reviewer \u2014 para este cambio')

print(f'  \U0001f4a1 Agente sugerido: {chr(59)+chr(32).join(agent_hints)}')
print('')
"
